name: create_deploy_spec
description: Evals for the create_deploy_spec skill — verify it triggers on first-time deploy spec authoring and skips on routine deploy execution (which is a different skill+workflow).

evals.name: triggers_on_no_deploy_yml
evals.input: I want to deploy Cobalt. I don't think it has a deploy spec yet.
evals.reason: Product without deploy.yml — first author it, then deploy.

evals.name: triggers_on_new_component
evals.input: Acme is going to have a new component called background_worker. Add it to its deploy spec.
evals.reason: Extending an existing deploy.yml with a new component.

evals.name: triggers_on_legacy_refactor
evals.input: Convert the legacy odoo_deploy.yml into Acme's new deploy.yml.
evals.reason: Refactoring legacy ad-hoc deploy script into the schema deploy/1.

evals.name: skips_on_routine_deploy
evals.input: Deploy Acme now, everything is tested.
evals.reason: Routine deploy execution — uses use_deploy_spec rule + deploy_product workflow + wsp deploy command, not this skill.

evals.name: skips_on_status_question
evals.input: What components does Acme deploy in production?
evals.reason: Read-only question about an existing spec, no authoring.
